title: Restful
description:
Save multiple respawn points and choose where to respawn
Making beds more useful
body:
**Restful** lets you save multiple respawn points and choose where you wake up when you die.

Right-click any bed or charged respawn anchor to register it as a respawn point. When you die, a grid appears showing all your valid points, then click one or press 1-9 to pick.

Use `/restful` to manage your list: rename points, mark favorites, reorder, or delete.
